projects.title: Embedding mental health support in a national WhatsApp-based parenting programme
projects.description: Co-designed and evaluated Crianza con Conciencia+ (CC+), a digital parenting and mental health intervention deployed inside the Mexican public health system. Work spans intervention design, implementation strategy across four states, and the feasibility and early-effectiveness evaluation.

projects.title: Research programme for a West African lay first responder platform
projects.description: Directing research and evaluation for iResponder, a mobile dispatch and responder-wellbeing application serving volunteer first responders in Sierra Leone and across West Africa. Scope includes platform measurement strategy and a three-country longitudinal cohort study of responder mental health.

projects.title: Multi-country RCT of a video intervention to reduce addiction stigma
projects.description: Co-led design, protocol, and analysis of a randomised controlled trial testing a short wordless animated video across 13,500 participants in multiple countries. Pilot results are published in Addictive Behaviors Reports; the full trial is in analysis.

projects.title: Meta-analysis of psychotherapy effectiveness in LMICs
projects.description: Led a systematic review and meta-analysis of psychotherapy effectiveness across low- and middle-income country settings. Outputs fed into cost-effectiveness modelling used by global health funders and shaped the institute's subsequent research agenda.
